raw_text: Hi, this is Ward 3B. There's been a fluid spill in the bay 4 bathroom and it needs a cleanup before the next patient is moved in. Could someone from environmental services come up when they get a chance? Thanks.

classification.reasoning: This is a straightforward environmental services request for spill cleanup in a patient-care area with a defined timeline (before next patient admission), making it a standard medium-urgency facility task with an implied SLA.

actions.detail: Extracted details — location: Ward 3B, Bay 4 bathroom, requester: Ward 3B staff.
Confirmation message drafted for the requester.
actions.artifact:
Thank you for reaching out. We have logged a service request for a fluid spill cleanup in the Ward 3B, Bay 4 bathroom and have routed it to the Environmental Services team. They will attend to the area within the service window.

If the situation changes or you have any additional details to add, please don't hesitate to contact the operations desk. We appreciate you letting us know promptly.
